channel.title: How we add Gtag Code on particular page?
channel.description:
Hello Friends,
I need your help for add below code in thank you page. gtag('event', 'conversion', {'send_to': 'AW-44/XXX'});
Any idea how we implement this code?
I have added google tag manager and analysis code it's working fine.
Thanks.

item.title: How we add Gtag Code on particular page?
item.dc:creator: bhagvan.vrinsofts
item.description:
Hello Friends,

I need your help for add below code in thank you page.
gtag(‘event’, ‘conversion’, {‘send_to’: ‘AW-44/XXX’});

Any idea how we implement this code?

I have added google tag manager and analysis code it’s working fine.

Thanks.

Read full topic
item.source: How we add Gtag Code on particular page?
